narrative:
Brush Creek Township has 710 registered voters, with 45.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.7 percentage points.
